House of Gucci (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $53,809,574Details
International Box Office $93,664,564
Worldwide Box Office $147,474,138
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $729,288
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $899,198
Total $1,628,486
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When Patrizia Reggiani, an outsider from humble beginnings, marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a reckless spiral of betrayal, decadence, revenge, and ultimately… murder.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,423,794 (26.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.73 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,471 opening theaters/3,477 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $63,063,692

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 24th, 2021 (Wide) by United Artists
International Releases: November 24th, 2021 (Wide), released as Klan Gucci (Slovakia)
November 24th, 2021 (Wide) (Switzerland)
November 24th, 2021 (Wide) (France)
November 25th, 2021 (Limited) (Lithuania)
November 25th, 2021 (Wide), released as Casa Gucci (Portugal)
Video Release: February 1st, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language, some sexual content, and brief nudity and violence.
(Rating bulletin 2699 (cert #53412), 9/22/2021)
Running Time: 160 minutes
Plot point: Crime, Fashion, Mariticide / Uxoricide
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Fox 2000 Pictures, Scott Free Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary

Synopsis

When Patrizia Reggiani, an outsider from humble beginnings, marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a reckless spiral of betrayal, decadence, revenge, and ultimately… murder.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,423,794 (26.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.73 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,471 opening theaters/3,477 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $63,063,692

Domestic Releases: November 24th, 2021 (Wide) by United Artists

November 24th, 2021 (Wide) (France)
November 25th, 2021 (Limited) (Lithuania)
November 25th, 2021 (Wide), released as Casa Gucci (Portugal)
Video Release: February 1st, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language, some sexual content, and brief nudity and violence.
(Rating bulletin 2699 (cert #53412), 9/22/2021)
